sys_script_include.description:
2.8.6 | 2025-05-29 | raj | STRY0162001 - DEFECT- If generated from Template, then cannot Change Primary Assignee in Subtask if Top Task is in a Private OU 2.8.4 | 2024-04-04 | raj | DFCT0012389 - Creating a task from a template as a private user causes primary assignee to display no results when task is active 2.8.4 | 2024-04-04 | raj | DFCT0012390 - Creating a task from a template as a private user & clearing primary assignee causes assigned member to only display user logged in as when task is active
2.8.3HF | 2023-09-25 | raj | DFCT0012181 - DIA - Improve Template Creation Response and Avoid thread locking 2.8 | 2022-02-22 | raj | STRY0118875- Need to rewrite/rework workflow 2.7.2 | 2022-02-08 | raj | DFCT0010780 - "Set Due Time" field on "Template" causes the next task to SKIP a day if the parent(or previous order's) task's time is set to after "end of day" (17:00:00)
2.7 STRY0100724 - DEV Story- Performance Improvements - Running Templates - This is a new script include that replaces the workflow. It also udpates the template instance status to track completion STRY0105125 - DIA - Draft Scheduled Tasks - Banner Notification STRY0110317 - DIA: Time in Task suspense date defaults to the time when creating the Templates. Adjust the default time to the end of the day for all new Templates. DFCT0010609 - "Suspense Date" on tasks created from "Templates" adds 1 hour
This script include takes a Template and builds the associated Task Tree
sys_script_include.name: Tasker_GenerateTaskFromTemplate
